math_recheck: Re-derived against arXiv 2301.07733 LaTeX: linear-in-D key bound (Lem key), inverted lower bound d_hat (Thm D-lower-bound), DA telescoping (Lem ip-expansion), s-norm Young step alpha^2=2d^2/gamma (Lem snp1-bound), asymptotic 12DG/sqrt(n+1)+8DG^2 and pre-Jensen 16DG (Thm 1), non-asymptotic log_2+ induction both cases (Lem mindk), d-settles theta*=1+sqrt3 => D/(1+sqrt3)~0.366D (Thm dasym), GD extra log(n+2) via integral lemma, and the Adam EMA derivation d_hat=r_hat/((1-sqrt b2)||s||_1). Confirmed code faithful to canonical dadapt_sgd.py (Option II x2) and dadapt_adam_preprint.py (Option I, (sksq/(1-b2)-gsq)/sk_l1); both python blocks AST-parse.
fixes: reasoning.md:193 fixed false claim that the implemented variants use the hyper-gradient Option II form -- SGD code uses Option II but the Adam code transcribes dadapt_adam_preprint.py's Option I (EMA weighted-norm) form; rewrote the paragraph to derive Option II then bridge to the Option I bookkeeping the Adam code actually implements, matching the canonical code and the code-block comment
